_notes: RoCE/RoE for all years sourced from the methodology-recalculated 10-year table in HERO_2022.txt (lines 1117-1129, 'Return On Capital Employed (ROCE)' and 'Return On Average Equity (ROAE)'), per task instruction to prefer that table. Individual ARs report slightly different RoCE/RoE numbers (different/earlier methodology); these differences are noted in the FY-level evidence.

motorcycles/scooters/exports set to null for every year: the standalone financial statements and Board's Reports disclose only TOTAL two-wheeler units. They do not break out motorcycle vs scooter vs export UNITS on a comparable basis. (HERO_2022 MDA line 3087 shows a DOMESTIC-only price-segment split incl. Scooter 3,05,892 units, but this is domestic-only and not a total motorcycle/scooter/export split, so excluded.)

capexIntangibles = null for every year: all ARs report a single combined 'Capital expenditure on PP&E ... and intangible assets including capital advances' line in the cash-flow statement; PP&E vs intangible capex is not separately disclosed. capexPPE holds that combined cash-flow capex figure.

FY16/FY17 ARs: FY16 AR is old Indian GAAP. FY17 AR (and FY18 AR comparatives) restated to Ind AS. The FY16 figures recorded here are the AS-ORIGINAL Indian-GAAP audited standalone numbers from HERO_2016.txt current-year column. Note Ind-AS-restated FY16 (e.g. PAT 3,160.19) appears as the comparative in HERO_2017.txt; not used.

revenueGross/exciseDuty: FY16 (Indian GAAP) shows gross sales of products and excise as a deduction within revenue. FY17 & FY18 (Ind AS) present 'Revenue from operations' GROSS of excise with excise shown as a separate expense line, so revenueNet = revenue from operations minus excise duty. FY19+ has no excise (GST regime), so revenueNet = revenueGross = revenue from operations.
leaseLiabilities (Ind AS 116) only from FY20; FY16-FY19 leaseLiabilities = 0. borrowings = 0 every year (Hero is debt-free; 10-year table HERO_2022 line 1104 'Debt (Borrowings)' = - for all years).

ebitdaDisclosed = the AR-disclosed 'Profit before Finance cost(s) and Depreciation' (standalone), which is computed on Total Income (i.e. INCLUDES other income). FY16 figure is 'Profit before Finance Costs, Depreciation & Exceptional Item'.

FY16.sourceAR: Hero MotoCorp Ltd. Annual Report 2015-16 (FY ended 31-Mar-2016); BSE scripcode 500182

evidence.pl: L8035 'Net revenue from operations 28,599.30'; L8031 '(a) Gross sales of products 30,418.66'; L8032 'Less: Excise duty 2,258.18'; L8036 'II Other income 391.12'; L8043 '(e) Depreciation and amortization expenses 441.40'; L8042 '(d) Finance costs 2.15'; L8048 'VI Exceptional item ... - ' (nil current year); L8050 'VII Profit before tax 4,394.58'; L8055 'IX Profit for the year 3,132.37'. EBITDA: L4028 'Profit before Finance Costs, Depreciation & Exceptional Item 4,838.13' (standalone).
evidence.bs: L7975/7994 'Total 12,340.69'; netWorth = L7958 'Share capital 39.94' + L7959 'Reserves and surplus 7,904.81' = 7,944.75; L7971 'creditors other than micro ... 2,766.88' (trade payables); L7989 'Inventories 672.98'; L7990 'Trade receivables 1,282.80'; L7991 'Cash and cash equivalents 131.36'; L7988 'Current investments 3,247.01'; L7983 'Non-current investments 1,019.36'. No separate 'Bank balances other than' line under old GAAP (otherBank=null); the 131.36 includes unpaid-dividend bank balances per L8174-8176.
evidence.cf: L8134 'Net cash from operating activities 3,913.79'; L8148 'Capital expenditure on fixed assets, including capital advances (1,534.49)'; L8150 'Net cash (used) in investing activities (2,271.34)'; L8165 'Net cash (used) in financing activities (1,683.95)'.
evidence.ops: L4067-4068 'your Company clocked sales of 6,632,322 units'; L482 'Sold 6,632,322 units of two-wheelers'. No motorcycle/scooter/export unit split disclosed.
evidence.ratios: Preferred (HERO_2022 10-yr table) L1125 ROCE FY16 = 49.02; L1128 ROAE FY16 = 39.03. (FY16 AR itself reported L3353 'Return On Average Capital Employed 60.7' and L3354 'Return On Average Equity 43.2' on a different methodology.)
